channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opinion: Calls to Reduce US-China Tensions Over Taiwan Amid Historical and Strategic Debate
item.description: The article presents an opinion arguing that the United States should reduce its military and political confrontation with China over Taiwan. It traces the historical background of Taiwan’s relationsh...

item.title: Retired Nigeria Immigration Service comptrollers sue Interior Minister over alleged unpaid retirement benefits
item.description: No fewer than 176 retired officers of the Nigeria Immigration Service have taken legal action against the Minister of Interior, Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo, the Comptroller-General of the NIS, and four other g...

item.title: Lagos demolishes 17 buildings and seals 52 others for breaching building plans, enforcement continues
item.description: Lagos State authorities carried out a targeted enforcement action, demolishing 17 buildings and sealing 52 others due to breaches of approved building plans. The exercise aimed to restore order and up...

item.title: Tanzania Serengeti Boys to Meet Senegal in AFCON Final After Historic Run
item.description: Tanzania’s national youth football team, the Serengeti Boys, has made history by reaching the final of the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON), where they will face Senegal in a highly anticipated match. Th...

item.title: Treasury faces scrutiny over CGT reform claims amid OECD critique
item.description: A former Treasury insider has challenged the Albanese government’s approach to capital gains tax (CGT), arguing that the department selectively uses OECD research to suggest that replacing the 50% CGT...

item.title: Alvarez & Marsal opens Cape Town office to expand African infrastructure and mining advisory services
item.description: Global consultancy firm Alvarez & Marsal has officially expanded its footprint into Africa with the launch of its first office on the continent, based in Cape Town. The move reflects growing internati...

item.title: Fonseca stuns Djokovic to reach French Open last 16 as shocks ripple through Paris
item.description: Brazilian teenager Joao Fonseca produced a historic upset at the French Open, stunning world No. 3 Novak Djokovic in a dramatic five-set battle that ended 4-6, 4-6, 6-3, 7-5, 7-5 in Djokovic’s third-r...

item.title: Legal experts question DOJ transparency over sealed Jack Smith Mar-a-Lago report
item.description: Legal analysts are raising concerns about the U.S. Department of Justice’s handling of a sealed portion of special counsel Jack Smith’s report related to former President Donald Trump’s retention of c...

item.title: Study finds cannabis edibles and alcohol significantly impair driving and may evade standard sobriety tests
item.description: A new study from Johns Hopkins Medicine highlights serious safety risks associated with combining cannabis edibles and alcohol, showing that the mixture can significantly impair driving ability more t...

item.title: Government to Train School Heads in Modern Education Leadership Skills
item.description: The Government has announced a new initiative aimed at strengthening the capacity of school heads across Tanzania by equipping them with modern skills and knowledge aligned with the current education ...

item.title: Bafana Bafana held to goalless draw by Nicaragua in World Cup warm-up
item.description: Bafana Bafana struggled to break down a youthful Nicaraguan side in a 0-0 friendly at Orlando Stadium on Friday night, leaving a passionate Johannesburg crowd disappointed. Despite dominating possessi...

item.title: How Freddie Ljungberg’s Guidance Shaped Bukayo Saka’s Football Career
item.description: Bukayo Saka’s rise at Arsenal and England is traced back to a pivotal moment in 2016 when Freddie Ljungberg, then coaching Arsenal’s under-15s, delivered a critical yet supportive message to the young...

item.title: Abia State Government Reclaims Forests and Communities from Bandits, Otti Says
item.description: Abia State Governor Alex Otti says the state, with help from security agencies, succeeded in reclaiming forests and communities previously terrorised by bandits. In his third anniversary address at Um...

item.title: Overview of the Upcoming Show ‘True Manila Encounters’
item.description: ‘True Manila Encounters’ is an upcoming entertainment offering that promises to showcase compelling stories set in the heart of Manila. Produced by ABS-CBN, the Philippines’ leading media and entertai...

item.title: Trump Endorses Randy Feenstra for Iowa Governor While Turning Point USA Backs Zach Lahn
item.description: A notable division has emerged within the Republican Party in Iowa ahead of the gubernatorial primary. President Donald Trump officially endorsed Rep. Randy Feenstra for governor, praising his backgro...

item.title: Trump Faces Multiple Legal Setbacks and Criticism Amid Republican Discontent
item.description: President Donald Trump experienced several significant legal and public relations setbacks recently. In Virginia, a federal judge ordered the Department of Justice's 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' frozen u...

item.title: PTI Leaders Expelled from Gilgit-Baltistan over Alleged Election Code Violation
item.description: During the ongoing election campaign in Gilgit-Baltistan, several leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI), including Khyber Pakhtunkhwa president MNA Junaid Akbar, were expelled from the region. Acc...

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon reflects on retaining Peter Murrell amid SNP embezzlement scandal
item.description: Nicola Sturgeon, former First Minister of Scotland, has expressed regret for keeping Peter Murrell as chief executive of the Scottish National Party (SNP) when she became party leader in 2014. Speakin...

item.title: Nevers Mumba calls for African youth unity and cross-border cooperation at YouLead Summit in Arusha
item.description: Former Zambia Vice President Nevers Mumba has called on African youth to remove colonial-era divisions that still limit cooperation and development across the continent. Speaking during the 9th YouLea...

item.title: CBS insiders react to leadership shakeup as Trump-aligned chief reconfigures '60 Minutes'
item.description: This article reports on internal upheaval at CBS following the appointment of Bari Weiss as editor-in-chief and the subsequent staffing changes at the investigative program '60 Minutes.' Source materi...
